Container.Name: Forge
Container.Overview: Forge is a personal workout routine builder. Plan your training with exercises, supersets, and set targets. Data is stored locally in SQLite.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port for the Forge web interface.

Config.Name: Data
Config.Description: Persistent storage for the SQLite database.

Config.Name: Database Path
Config.Description: Path inside the container where the SQLite database file is stored. Only change this if you know what you're doing.

Config.Name: Port (internal)
Config.Description: Internal port the server listens on. Must match the exposed Web UI Port unless you are doing custom port mapping.
